meta.methodology: Ratings compiled from public agency testimonials, press coverage, community forums, and operator reports. Scale: 1-5. Updated quarterly.

strengths: Strongest government relations and procurement framework in the DFR space
Frequent firmware updates with AI autonomy improvements
Blue UAS certification maintained — simplifies procurement
Deep CAD integrations (Axon, Fusus, ESRI) — purpose-built for LE
DFR Command software suite simplifies program management
weaknesses: Premium pricing — highest cost platform in category
FAA consulting is not a core Skydio service — agencies need Flying Lion or SkyfireAI separately
RMA turnaround for 24/7 DFR ops reported as average — not best-in-class
known_agency_testimonials: St. Cloud FL PD: drones arrive before officers 80% of the time in first 6 months
Redmond WA PD: under 90 second response, suspects intercepted
DEA: selected R10 for chain of custody (Axon Evidence) capabilities

strengths: Purpose-built for law enforcement — co-developed with LE agencies
Exceptional training program — SWAT, tactical, breaching scenarios
US manufacturing (Seattle) — domestic supply chain advantage
Echodyne DAA partnership — automated BVLOS pathway
Two-way audio + glass breaker are unique tactical capabilities
weaknesses: Indoor-only platform — not a patrol DFR solution
No native CAD integration
FAA waiver consulting not a BRINC service
Premium price for narrow use case
known_agency_testimonials: Officers can surveil areas too dangerous to send a person (PoliceMag)

strengths: Flock911 — only native 911-to-drone auto-dispatch in the US
Full-stack ecosystem — drone + dock + software + ALPR + CAD integration
White-glove deployment support — Flock core competency is agency support
Fastest DFR drone at 60mph with 45min flight time
ALPR from 2,000ft — unique capability for pursuit/suspect tracking
weaknesses: Not Blue UAS listed — more documentation burden for federal grant procurement
Proprietary ecosystem — locked into Flock stack
No Axon Evidence integration — chain of custody gap for federal prosecution
Newer to DFR market (Aerodome acquisition 2024) — less operational history than Skydio
known_agency_testimonials: Scottsdale PD Chief Walther: respond to real-time emergencies faster and with more precision
Denver PD: 215 calls responded to since October pilot launch

strengths: Blue UAS listed — clean federal procurement path
Best-in-class zoom (32x) + FLIR thermal combo at price point
FEMA-deployed — proven in disaster response
Massachusetts assembly — domestic manufacturing claim
weaknesses: French parent company — FOCI/ownership disclosure may be required
No native DFR dock solution
No CAD integration
FAA waiver consulting not a Parrot service
Less purpose-built for DFR than Skydio or Flock

strengths: Supports 50%+ of DFR programs nationwide — unmatched operational experience
55,000+ DFR missions flown including 35,000+ BVLOS
Full-service: FAA consulting, training, dock install, maintenance, equipment leasing
FLI Town — first dedicated DFR training center in the US
Platform-agnostic — works with Skydio, Inspired Flight, and others
weaknesses: Service provider, not manufacturer — platform availability depends on partners
Geographic coverage may be limited for smaller agencies
ratings.forge_relevance: Flying Lion is the best validation contact for DFR report templates — they have more real operational data than any single manufacturer.

strengths: Selected as Ohio statewide DFR program manager — highest-profile state DFR contract
Full-service: vendor coordination, FAA compliance, operator training, SOP development
AI-powered automated data analysis — pathway to full autonomy
Strong government relationships — capable of managing state-level programs
Medical drone delivery experience (CVS Health partnership)
weaknesses: Premium consulting rates — less accessible for small agencies
Capacity constraints with Ohio statewide program may limit availability
ratings.forge_relevance: SkyfireAI's Ohio program structure is the template for state-level DFR reports. Monitor their expansion for replication signals.
